_note: FROZEN full-path-sim baseline. Re-baseline only intentionally (delete + rerun gen).
_rebaseline_note: Re-frozen 2026-06-10 for Daniel coach-audit #1 + #2 (composition refinements, on top of the #3 lower-cap freeze). #1 (compoundSetFloor in scaleSetsByEnergy/scaleSetsByReadiness/trimSessionToTimeBudget): a tier-1 compound's working sets never fall below 3 under the deficit/readiness/time cuts (a CUT trims accessories/isolations + drops tail work, never the main lift's 3-set dose) — chest press 2→3 on a v-taper push. #2 (UPPER arm de-dup in buildSession): the upper catch-all drops its redundant standalone TRICEPS isolation (triceps is hit by the day's presses; the under-served biceps stays, guaranteed) so upper lands at 7 focused lifts — meanExerciseCount drifts down (~7.3→6.7 OFF) as upper sheds one arm. Both UNGATED (correct shape, not flags). VERIFIED DETERMINISTIC (two fresh runs reproduce 75b5dd7e / 9cf49a5d — no RNG/clock leak; the section-A fresh-OFF-reproduces-itself test passes) and SAFE: section-C is self-relative ON-vs-OFF and HOLDS — craterOn 56 <= craterOff 70, oscillation 0=0, absurd ON 37 <= OFF 37 + 10 band, convergence ON 12.2% within band of OFF 12.3%. Persona-matrix #70 gate green (26 personas); the v-taper program now reads chest-press 3 sets on push, upper 7 (biceps kept), lower 2 big lifts. #2 chosen as deterministic keep-biceps-drop-redundant-triceps (triceps covered by pressing, biceps under-served) rather than literal weekly bi/tri alternation — simpler + lower-risk, reversible if Daniel prefers true alternation.
